title: Garden Route wildfire contained: Little Brak, Brandwacht and Mossel Bay areas
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Garden Route District...
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to a statement issued by the GRDM communications team this morning, fire crews worked through the night to suppress all accessible hotspots in the affected areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the situation is currently stable, patrol and verification operations will continue throughout the morning and into the afternoon to ensure that no flare-ups occur along the outer perimeter.","html":"While the situation is currently stable, patrol and verification operations will continue throughout the morning and into the afternoon to ensure that no flare-ups occur along the outer perimeter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A team from the GRDM Fire & Rescue Services remains on site to monitor conditions and carry out mop-up operations.","html":"A team from the GRDM Fire & Rescue Services remains on site to monitor conditions and carry out mop-up operations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Residents and road users are urged to remain vigilant. Anyone who spots smoke, a veld fire, or a wildfire, should report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071, or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The GRDM extended its appreciation to all fire personnel and support teams for their continued dedication in managing wildfire risks across the district.","html":"The GRDM extended its appreciation to all fire personnel and support teams for their continued dedication in managing wildfire risks across the district."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route wildfire contained: Little Brak, Brandwacht and Mossel Bay areas
